title: Add unified spec runner summary tool
description: Create a simple tool that runs Python and Rust specs and reports pass/fail plus coverage summary in one output.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Updated tools/run_specs.py to default to text summary and include error details in the final output (Python/Rust spec errors and Rust coverage errors).

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Ran python3 tools/run_specs.py --format text: Python specs passed with 99.8% coverage; Rust specs passed with 100.0% coverage.

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Added direct protocol handling scenario to cover daemon_server ProtocolError mapping and updated run_specs error handling. Ran python3 tools/run_specs.py --format text: Python specs 100.0% coverage; Rust specs 100.0% coverage.

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Tool runs both Python behave and Rust cucumber/tarpaulin, prints per-language status and coverage in a final summary. No commits.
